price_target.kill_condition: If Q3 法說會 downgrades H2-FY26 from 「滿載」 to 「可控」 → cut to half. If 滿載 disappears → exit.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI/HPC 載板比重需從最新法說會抓 — 估計 25–35% 進行中

B_order_visibility.note: 預期 ★★★★ 以上 once H2 滿載 confirmed with Phase-2 capex receipts

C_growth_potential.note: 5y CAGR depends on CoWoS expansion run-rate at TSMC + advanced-package take-off

E_increasing_moat.note: Capacity is moat — Phase-2 announcement = moat widening if customer-committed

F_revaluation.note: Mix-shift + margin step-up are the two primary 重估 levers

order_visibility.kill: Q3 法說會 H2 utilization language drops from 「滿載」 to 「可控」 — cut to half. Two consecutive quarters of softer language — exit.

mechanism.en: [PENDING ≥600 words: ABF substrate → CoWoS package → AI accelerator → hyperscaler revenue. Quantify dollar content per AI accelerator and current addressable share.]

moat_widening.en: [PENDING: Capacity is the moat — Ibiden/Shinko constrained, Korean entrants 2+ years behind on advanced ABF. Phase-2 expansion compounds the lead. Quantify capacity share trajectory.]

revaluation_thesis.en: [PENDING: Market still prices Unimicron as a PC-cycle PCB maker. AI/HPC mix shift from ~10% to projected 30%+ over 3 years + margin structural step-up = multiple re-rating from ~[X]× to peer ~[Y]×.]

kill_condition.en: Hyperscaler capex digestion + Korean ABF capacity online concurrent. If both, the capacity moat compresses faster than mix shift can lift margins.

if_kill_then.en: Cut to half on first signal. Move proceeds to test (2449 KYEC) which runs on shipped-units, not capex.
